name: My Stir Fried Cabbage
recipeInstructions:
1. Use enough cabbage to feed 4 people; about 4-5 cups.
2. Heat oil in a wok over medium heat.
3. Add black mustard seeds and cook until they pop.
4. Add turmeric.
5. Add some slices of red and white cabbage (about 1 inch wide), about 4 cups total, and stir until the oil coats the cabbage.
6. Cook until wilted; about 4-6 minutes.
7. Serve immediately.
